Since 2023 is odd, this requires 2^{a-b} ≡ -1 mod 2023. As noted, 2^x ≡ -1 mod 7 is impossible. Therefore, k(n)=2 is impossible. Let's re-examine k(n)=3. k(n)=3 implies 2^a + 2^b + 2^c ≡ 0 mod 2023.
